raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates sharpening the thesis, contribution claim, and benchmark framing above the sentence level.","R1.2":"Strengthening the text requires checking that the argument from benchmark design to reproducible evaluation and scoring follows coherently.","R1.3":"The passage makes empirical and benchmark-coverage claims whose force depends on alignment with the reported problems, metrics, and results.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is broad and revision-oriented, sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register are load-bearing responsibilities.","RX.1":"Any projection of a vague strengthening request must preserve uncertainty about unstated author intent and unavailable surrounding paper context.","RX.2":"The stronger version must avoid inflating claims beyond what the artifact reports about experiments, coverage, and reproducibility.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection rather than actually rewriting or evaluating the paper beyond the requested responsibility mapping.","RX.4":"The projection should account for avoiding downstream scholarly harm such as misleading benchmark claims or exaggerated reliability.","RX.5":"The responsibility mapping should remain traceable to concrete features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates sharpening the thesis, contribution claim, and benchmark framing above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the text requires checking that the argument from benchmark design to reproducible evaluation and scoring follows coherently.
rationale.R1.3: The passage makes empirical and benchmark-coverage claims whose force depends on alignment with the reported problems, metrics, and results.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is broad and revision-oriented, sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register are load-bearing responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a vague strengthening request must preserve uncertainty about unstated author intent and unavailable surrounding paper context.
rationale.RX.2: The stronger version must avoid inflating claims beyond what the artifact reports about experiments, coverage, and reproducibility.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection rather than actually rewriting or evaluating the paper beyond the requested responsibility mapping.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should account for avoiding downstream scholarly harm such as misleading benchmark claims or exaggerated reliability.
rationale.RX.5: The responsibility mapping should remain traceable to concrete features of the delegation and artifact.
